testcase.name: test_ask_stories

failure.message: TypeError: 'coroutine' object does not support the asynchronous context manager protocol

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_ask_stories.TestAskStories testMethod=test_ask_stories>
def test_ask_stories(self): > ask_stories = self.hn.ask_stories(limit=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_ask_stories.py:22: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ hackernews/__init__.py:320: in ask_stories ask_stories = self._get_stories('askstories', limit) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:161: in _get_stories return self.get_items_by_ids(item_ids=story_ids) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:214: in get_items_by_ids result = self._run_async(urls=urls) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:138: in _run_async results = loop.run_until_complete(self._async_loop(urls)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:653: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:124: in _async_loop responses = await asyncio.gather(*results) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <hackernews.HackerNews object at 0x105be5b50> url = 'https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/item/47303111.json' session = <httpx.AsyncClient object at 0x10303a6d0>
async def _get_async(self, url, session): """Asynchronous internal method used for GET requests
Args: url (str): URL to fetch session (obj): httpx client session for async loop
Returns: data (obj): Individual URL request's response corountine
""" data = None > async with session.get(url) as resp: E TypeError: 'coroutine' object does not support the asynchronous context manager protocol
hackernews/__init__.py:104: TypeError
